name: K pop Makeover Idol
description: Step into the world of K-pop and become the ultimate idol stylist! In K-Pop Love: Idol Dress Up, you create stunning looks, style rising stars, and turn them into global sensations. Mix and match trendy outfits, stylish hairstyles, and iconic accessories to design the perfect idol look. From cute debut concepts to powerful stage performances, every outfit you create tells a story. Once your look is ready, snap a photo and post it on social media inside the game! Watch your idol rise from Rookie Star to Global Superstar as fans react, trends explode, and your style goes viral!
